en: "But now they laugh at me, men who are younger than I, whose fathers I would have disdained to set with the dogs of my flock.
zh: “但現在年紀比我小的人都笑我； 我不容許他們的父親與我羊群的犬隻為伴。

en: What could I gain from the strength of their hands, men whose vigor is gone?
zh: 他們的氣力已經衰退了， 他們兩手的力量對我有甚麼益處呢？

en: Through want and hard hunger they gnaw the dry ground by night in waste and desolation;
zh: 他們因窮乏與飢餓而消瘦， 在黑夜荒廢與荒涼之地咀嚼曠野的乾草；

en: they pick saltwort and the leaves of bushes, and the roots of the broom tree for their food.
zh: 他們在草叢中採摘鹹草， 以羅騰樹根作食物。

en: They are driven out from human company; they shout after them as after a thief.
zh: 他們從人群中被趕出去， 人追喊他們如追喊賊一樣，

en: In the gullies of the torrents they must dwell, in holes of the earth and of the rocks.
zh: 以致他們住在驚嚇谷之中， 在地洞和巖穴之間；

en: Among the bushes they bray; under the nettles they huddle together.
zh: 他們在草叢中間喊叫， 在雜草之下集合起來。

en: A senseless, a nameless brood, they have been whipped out of the land.
zh: 他們都是愚頑人、下流人的子孫， 被人鞭打逐出境外。

en: "And now I have become their song; I am a byword to them.
zh: 現在他們以我為歌曲， 我竟成了他們的笑柄。

en: They abhor me; they keep aloof from me; they do not hesitate to spit at the sight of me.
zh: 他們厭惡我，遠遠地離開我， 又不住吐唾沫在我臉上，

en: Because God has loosed my cord and humbled me, they have cast off restraint in my presence.
zh: 因為 神把我的弓弦鬆開，叫我受苦， 他們就在我面前任意妄為 。

en: On my right hand the rabble rise; they push away my feet; they cast up against me their ways of destruction.
zh: 一窩暴民在我右邊興起， 推開我的腳，築起災難的路攻擊我。

en: They break up my path; they promote my calamity; they need no one to help them.
zh: 他們拆毀了我的路， 沒有別人的幫助也能毀滅我；

en: As through a wide breach they come; amid the crash they roll on.
zh: 他們闖進來如闖大破口， 在廢墟之中輥過來，

en: Terrors are turned upon me; my honor is pursued as by the wind, and my prosperity has passed away like a cloud.
zh: 驚駭臨到我的身上， 驅逐我的尊嚴如風吹一般， 我的好景像雲一樣過去。

en: "And now my soul is poured out within me; days of affliction have taken hold of me.
zh: 現在我的心傷慟有如倒了出來， 苦難的日子把我抓住。

en: The night racks my bones, and the pain that gnaws me takes no rest.
zh: 夜間痛苦刺透我的骨頭， 疼痛不止，不住地咀嚼我。

en: With great force my garment is disfigured; it binds me about like the collar of my tunic.
zh: 我的衣服因 神的大力變了形， 他的大力如外衣的領口把我束緊。

en: God has cast me into the mire, and I have become like dust and ashes.
zh: 神把我扔在泥中， 我就像塵土和爐灰一般。

en: I cry to you for help and you do not answer me; I stand, and you only look at me.
zh: 神啊！我向你呼求，你卻不應允我， 我站起來，你也不理我。

en: You have turned cruel to me; with the might of your hand you persecute me.
zh: 你變成待我殘忍， 用你大能的手迫害我，

en: You lift me up on the wind; you make me ride on it, and you toss me about in the roar of the storm.
zh: 你把我提到風中，使我被風颳去， 使我在暴風中消散。

en: For I know that you will bring me to death and to the house appointed for all living.
zh: 我知道你必使我歸回死地， 歸到那為眾生所定的陰宅。

en: "Yet does not one in a heap of ruins stretch out his hand, and in his disaster cry for help?
zh: 然而人跌倒，怎會不伸手？ 人遇災禍，怎會不呼救呢？

en: Did not I weep for him whose day was hard? Was not my soul grieved for the needy?
zh: 艱難過日的，我不是為他哀哭； 貧窮的，我不是為他憂愁嗎？

en: But when I hoped for good, evil came, and when I waited for light, darkness came.
zh: 我希望得福樂，災禍就來了； 我等候光明，幽暗就到了。

en: My inward parts are in turmoil and never still; days of affliction come to meet me.
zh: 我的心腸沸騰、不安， 痛苦的日子臨到我。

en: I go about darkened, but not by the sun; I stand up in the assembly and cry for help.
zh: 我四處行走，全身發黑， 並不是因為日曬； 我在會中站著呼求。

en: I am a brother of jackals and a companion of ostriches.
zh: 我與野狗為兄弟， 又與鴕鳥作同伴。

en: My skin turns black and falls from me, and my bones burn with heat.
zh: 我的皮膚發黑脫落， 我的骨頭因熱發燒，

en: My lyre is turned to mourning, and my pipe to the voice of those who weep.
zh: 所以我的琴音變為哀音， 我的簫聲變為哭聲。”
